cases.desc: PutEdge create: single ENTITY_COOCCUR edge appended, visible via EdgeLog.ReadNode
PutEdge weight-increment: two PutEdge calls same (source,target,ENTITY_COOCCUR) -> Compact sums weight
PutEdge LLM_ASSERTED: two calls -> Compact dedups (last-write-wins), not summed
PutEdge with nil edgeLog -> Unavailable, not panic
PutEntity + LookupEntity round trip: single file
PutEntity twice with same (entity,file) is idempotent upsert
PutEntity multiple files under same entity -> LookupEntity returns all, ascending fileID order
LookupEntity for never-registered entity -> empty result, not error
PutEntity with nil entityIndex -> Unavailable, not panic
Entity index keys never appear in SearchCandidates results (namespace isolation)
